de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Class KeyIO

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyIO

  • public class KeyIO
extends java.lang.Object
    This facade provides high level access to parse and interpret key files or input strings into declarations, proof, problem, terms.

    This classes encapsulates the Services, NamespaceSet for SchemaVariables. It also modifies them during interpretation.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  KeyIO.Loader
      Loading of complete KeY files into the given schema.
